benchmark_case_name: Artifact Fix vs Organization Fix Separation
summary: The latest runtime loop proof review packet separates artifact-local preservation guidance from organization-level expansion guidance, so diagnosis no longer collapses both layers into one recommendation.

artifact_change_recommendations: Preserve the full allocation-to-review evidence chain when copying this pattern into other backend families.
organization_change_recommendations: Expand the same auditable loop shape across additional backend families before the next release tag.

notes: This verdict uses the diagnosis-aware council-review-packet fields added in the current runtime.
It proves structure and separation, but not yet multi-case diagnosis accuracy.
